name: Voice Command Palette
description: Voice-activated command interface with real-time waveform visualization, live transcription, contextual suggestion chips, and processing feedback — a voice-first alternative to traditional command palettes.

overlay.description: Full-screen centered overlay with backdrop blur — large waveform at top, live transcript below, suggestion chips at the bottom, suitable for primary voice command invocation

inline.description: Embedded voice command input within a page section — compact waveform, transcript, and suggestions rendered inline without overlay or backdrop, for persistent voice interfaces

floating.description: Small 48px circle near the mic button that expands into a pill shape showing transcript and suggestions — minimal footprint, ideal for always-available voice access in toolbars

visual_brief: In overlay mode: a centered modal panel (max-width 560px, rounded-2xl, bg-surface, shadow-2xl) appears over a full-screen backdrop (bg-black/50%, backdrop-blur-sm). The panel is vertically stacked. At the top (p-6): a large waveform visualization (the same bar-style as voice-waveform pattern, but wider — 48 bars spanning the full panel width) showing the user's live speech input. The bars are accent-colored during active speech and collapse to muted during silence. Below the waveform (px-6): a live transcript area (min-height 48px, max-height 120px) displaying the real-time speech-to-text result in text-lg font-medium. Text appears word-by-word with a blinking cursor at the end. A muted placeholder ('Say a command...') shows when no speech has been captured. Below the transcript (px-6, pb-4): a horizontally scrollable row of suggestion chips. Each chip is a pill (rounded-full, px-3 py-1.5, border, text-sm) showing a parsed command interpretation ('Navigate to /settings', 'Open file: main.ts', 'Run build'). The most likely suggestion has a filled background (bg-accent, text-accent-foreground). Others have outline style. Chips update in real-time as the transcript changes — they fade in/out with 150ms transitions. At the bottom of the panel: a thin separator line, then a footer row (px-6, py-3) showing a HotkeyHint on the left ('Esc to cancel') and a small microphone status icon on the right. When the system is processing a recognized command: the waveform area is replaced by a ProcessingIndicator — a horizontal pulsing bar (4px tall, bg-accent, animated width oscillation from 20% to 80% and back). A brief success state flashes the panel border green (200ms) before the overlay dismisses. In floating mode: resting state is a 48px circle (bg-accent, shadow-lg) with a microphone icon (24px, white). On activation (click or hotkey), the circle smoothly expands (300ms spring) into a pill shape (width: 320px, height: auto, rounded-2xl, bg-surface, shadow-2xl). The pill shows a compact waveform (24px tall), a single-line transcript, and up to 3 suggestion chips below. Tapping outside or pressing Escape collapses it back to the circle.

layout_hints.container: fixed overlay or inline block depending on preset
layout_hints.note: The overlay preset should trap focus when open and return focus to the trigger element on close. The floating preset should not trap focus but should be keyboard-accessible.
layout_hints.dismissal: Overlay dismisses on: Escape key, click outside the panel, or successful command execution. Floating collapses on: Escape, tap outside, or 5s of silence after last speech.
layout_hints.command_parsing: Suggestion chips should be driven by an intent-parsing layer that matches partial transcripts against available commands. Show up to 5 suggestions in overlay mode, 3 in floating mode.
layout_hints.success_feedback: On successful command execution: flash panel border green (var(--d-success)) for 200ms, then dismiss with a scale-down + fade-out animation (200ms ease-in).

slots.command-overlay: The full-screen backdrop layer. Uses position: fixed, inset: 0. Background is black at 50% opacity with backdrop-filter: blur(4px). Clicking this backdrop area (outside the panel) dismisses the voice command palette. The overlay should fade in (opacity 0→1 over 150ms) on open and fade out on close. Z-index: 50 to sit above all page content. The overlay traps focus — Tab cycles only through interactive elements within the panel.
slots.voice-input: The primary interaction zone at the top of the modal panel. Contains two sub-regions: (1) WaveformPreview — a 48-bar amplitude visualization spanning the full panel width (approximately 480px), bars 4px wide with 3px gap, 48px tall, centered. Bars animate identically to the voice-waveform bar preset but scaled to panel width. (2) Transcript — a text area below the waveform (margin-top: 16px) showing the live speech-to-text output. Text renders in text-lg, font-medium. Words appear incrementally with 80ms fade-in per word. A blinking cursor (2px wide, accent color, 1s blink) follows the last word. When no speech has been captured, a muted placeholder reads 'Say a command...' in text-muted, italic. The transcript area has min-height: 48px and max-height: 120px with overflow-y: auto for long utterances.
slots.command-suggestion: A horizontally scrollable row of suggestion chips below the transcript. Each chip is a pill-shaped button: rounded-full, px-3, py-1.5, text-sm, font-medium. The highest-confidence suggestion uses filled style (bg-accent, text-accent-foreground). Remaining suggestions use outline style (border, text-foreground). Each chip has a subtle left icon indicating command type (navigation: arrow icon, action: play icon, query: search icon). Chips enter with a staggered fade-in (50ms delay per chip, 150ms duration). When the transcript changes, chips that are no longer relevant fade out (100ms) and new ones fade in. Clicking a chip immediately executes that command. The row is horizontally scrollable with scroll-snap-type: x mandatory and hidden scrollbar. Maximum 5 chips visible in overlay mode.
slots.processing-indicator: Shown when a command has been recognized and is being executed. Replaces the waveform area. A horizontal bar (4px tall, full width, rounded-full) with an animated fill: the filled portion oscillates between 20% and 80% width, sliding left to right and back, using accent color (bg-accent). Animation: 1.5s ease-in-out infinite. Below the bar, centered text in text-sm text-muted reads 'Processing: {command_summary}...'. The indicator enters with a crossfade from the waveform (200ms).
slots.result-preview: Shown briefly after successful command execution before the overlay dismisses. A compact preview of the command result: for navigation commands, shows the destination page title; for action commands, shows a checkmark + 'Done' message; for queries, shows a brief answer snippet. Renders in a muted card style (bg-muted/10%, rounded-lg, p-3, text-sm). Visible for 800ms before the overlay auto-dismisses.
slots.hotkey-hint: A small footer row at the bottom of the panel (px-6, py-3, border-t). Left side: keyboard shortcut hints in text-xs, text-muted, font-mono ('Esc to cancel · Enter to confirm'). Right side: a small microphone status indicator (12px circle — green when listening, red when error, gray when idle). The footer is visually understated to avoid competing with the main interaction area.

announcements: Voice command palette opened — listening for commands
keyboard: Cmd+Shift+V / Ctrl+Shift+V: open voice command palette
Arrow Left/Right: navigate between suggestion chips
Tab: cycle through suggestions and controls

responsive.mobile: Overlay panel expands to full-width (inset-x: 16px) with rounded-xl. Waveform reduces to 24 bars. Suggestion chips stack vertically instead of horizontal scroll. Floating preset circle increases to 56px for touch. Processing indicator uses full-width.
responsive.tablet: Overlay panel at max-width: 560px centered. Full 48-bar waveform. Horizontal chip scroll with touch. Floating preset unchanged.

transitions.overlay-open: backdrop opacity 0→1 150ms ease-out, panel scale(0.95)→scale(1) + opacity 0→1 200ms spring
transitions.overlay-close: panel scale(1)→scale(0.95) + opacity 1→0 150ms ease-in, backdrop opacity 1→0 150ms
transitions.floating-expand: circle width 48px→320px, height 48px→auto, border-radius 24px→16px over 300ms spring
transitions.success-flash: border-color → var(--d-success) 0ms, then back to default over 200ms ease-out

ambient.waveform-listening: continuous bar oscillation at 60fps synced to audio input

composition.VoiceCommandPalette: Dialog(d-surface, fixed|inline, z-50) > [VoiceInput + CommandSuggestions + ProcessingIndicator? + ResultPreview? + HotkeyHint]
composition.VoiceInput: Section(flex-col, gap-3, p-6) > [WaveformPreview(48-bar, animated) + Transcript(text-lg, live-updating)]
composition.CommandSuggestions: ScrollRow(flex, gap-2, overflow-x-auto, px-6) > CommandSuggestion*(d-interactive, pill, staggered-enter)
composition.ProcessingIndicator: Div(flex-col, items-center, gap-2) > [AnimatedBar(4px, accent, oscillating-width) + StatusText(text-sm, text-muted)]
composition.HotkeyHint: Footer(flex, justify-between, px-6, py-3, border-t) > [ShortcutText(text-xs, mono) + MicStatus(12px, dot)]
